introSection: Daddy Pig's Roller Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Peppa Pig Theme Park in Winter Haven, Florida, USA. It opened with the park on February 24, 2022.
fullText: Daddy Pig's Roller Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Peppa Pig Theme Park in Winter Haven, Florida, USA. It opened with the park on February 24, 2022.
